notes: PersonaChat: A Dataset for Persona-Based Dialogue Generation (Razumovskiy et al., arXiv:1801.07243). 1,155 crowd-sourced personas with 4–5 profile sentences each; 10,907 dialogues with 162K+ utterances. Early foundational work in persona-grounded dialogue. Persona attributes are represented as free-text profile sentences (interests, habits, traits).
